debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
t : Tree a
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds))))

        induction ds generalizing t with

have fromTs_cons (t : Tree a) (ts : List (Tree a)) :
          fromTs (t :: ts) = fromTs [t] ++ fromTs ts := by
        induction t generalizing ts <;> simp [fromTs]
        case node _ _ _ ih1 ih2 => simp [ih1, ih2]
      have consT_lemma (t : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)) :
          fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromTs [t] ++ fromRA ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, concatMap, fromTs]
        case cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, concatMap, fromTs]
          case one => rw [ih]; simp [fromTs_cons]
      simp [fromRA, concatMap] at consT_lemma
      rw [consT_lemma]
      simp [fromTs]

      simp [consRA, fromRA.frm]

have h : ∀ {a} (t : Tree a) (ds : RAList a), fromRA (consT t ds) = fromTree t ++ fromRA ds := by
        intro a t ds
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => simp [consT, fromRA]
        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d
          · simp [consT, fromRA]
            rw [concatMap]
            simp
          · simp [consT, fromRA]
            rw [ih]
            simp [link, fromTree]
      simp [consRA, consT]
      rw [h]
      simp [link, fromTree]

have lem : ∀ (t : Tree a) (ds : RAList a), fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) ++ fromRA ds := by

        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm, concatMap, ih]
      simp [consRA, consRA.consT]
      simp [fromRA, concatMap] at lem
      rw [lem]
      simp [fromRA, fromRA.frm, concatMap]
simp [consRA, fromRA_consT]

have h (t : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)) :
          fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) ++ fromRA ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => simp [consRA.consT, fromRA]
        | cons d ds ih => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm, *]
      rw [h]
      simp [fromRA.frm]

have lem : ∀ (t1 t2 : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)),
        fromRA (consRA.consT t1 t2 ds) = fromRA [Digit.one t1] ++ fromRA [Digit.one t2] ++ fromRA ds := by
        intro t1 t2 ds
        induction ds generalizing t1 t2 with
        | nil => simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, List.concatMap, List.map, List.append_assoc]
        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, List.concatMap, List.map, List.append_assoc]
          · rfl
          · rw [ih]; simp [List.append_assoc]
      simp [consRA, lem, fromRA, List.concatMap, List.map]

have h : ∀ (t : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)),
          fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA [Digit.one t] ++ fromRA ds := by
        intro t ds
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, concatMap]
        | cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, concatMap]
          rw [ih]
          simp [fromRA, concatMap]
      simp [consRA, consRA.consT]
      rw [h]
      simp [fromRA, concatMap]

have h : ∀ t ds, fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromTree t ++ fromRA ds := by
        intro t ds
        induction ds generalizing t <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm]
        case cons d ds ih =>
          cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm]
          rw [ih]
          simp [fromTree, link]
      rw [h]
      simp [fromTree, link]

have h_app : ∀ l1 l2, fromTs (l1 ++ l2) = fromTs l1 ++ fromTs l2 := by
        intro l1; induction l1 using fromTs.induct <;> simp [fromTs, *]
      have h : ∀ t ds, fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromTs [t] ++ fromRA ds := by
        intro t ds; induction ds generalizing t <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm, concatMap]
        case cons d ds ih => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm, concatMap, fromTs, h_app, ih]
      simp [consRA, h, fromTs]
